summary: Iteration 36: Tested removal of 'Simple & Preset Layouts' section and system page deletion capability. All tests passed - backend (10/12 tests, 2 minor endpoint path issues) and frontend UI verification complete.
critical_code_review_comments: PageEditorDialog.js: Only Visual Builder layouts shown (15 layouts from LAYOUTS object), no 'Simple & Preset Layouts' section
PageEditorDialog.js: Legacy layout migration notice shown for pages with legacy layouts (layout_1, layout_2, layout_3)
PagesManager.js: Delete button now visible for ALL pages including system pages (line 126)
PagesManager.js: System pages show warning confirmation before deletion
admin_content.py: DELETE /api/admin/nav-pages/{id} no longer blocks system page deletion (lines 325-327)
layoutDefinitions.js: BLOCK_TYPES includes gallery_albums block type
BlockRenderer.js: GalleryAlbumsBlock component renders album-based gallery from gallery_albums collection

success_rate.backend: 83% (10/12 tests passed - 2 minor endpoint path issues)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Two features verified: (1) 'Simple & Preset Layouts' section completely removed from page editor - only 15 Visual Builder layouts shown (Full Width, Boxed, Split Screen, About/Bio, Grid 2x2, Masonry, List, Carousel, Two Column, Three Column, Profile, Card Based, Hero Banner, Sidebar, Landing Page). (2) System pages (Home, News, Gallery, Reading List) can now be deleted - backend restriction removed and frontend delete button visible for all pages. Gallery Albums block type available in BLOCK_TYPES.

simple_preset_layouts_removed.details: No 'Simple & Preset Layouts' section in Content & Layout tab. No legacy layout options (layout_1, layout_2, layout_3) visible.

visual_builder_layouts_present.details: All 15 Visual Builder layouts present: full_width, boxed, split_screen, about_bio, grid, masonry, list, carousel, two_column, three_column, profile, card_based, hero_banner, sidebar_layout, landing

content_blocks_builder.details: Content Blocks builder appears when Visual Builder layout is selected

system_page_deletion_backend.details: DELETE /api/admin/nav-pages/{id} successfully deletes system pages (News, Gallery, Reading List tested)

system_page_deletion_frontend.details: Delete button visible for system pages in Actions column. Warning confirmation shown before deletion.

system_page_reseed.details: System pages can be re-seeded after deletion via POST /api/admin/seed-system-pages

gallery_albums_block_type.details: gallery_albums block type defined in BLOCK_TYPES in layoutDefinitions.js
